en: We want the numbers, Mason. That's all we've ever wanted.
ko: 메이슨., 그게 우리가 원했던 전부야., 그는 그들의 지식이 필요했어.

en: We needed their knowledge. What they'd learned.
ko: 우리는 그들의 지식이 필요했다. 그들이 배운 것.

en: Operation Ford, he implanted a double agent working with the Ascension group.
ko: 어센션 그룹과 함께 일하는 이중 스파이를.

en: Ecker, Groey, Weaver. His mission was to sabotage the rocket.
ko: 위버., 그의 임무는 로켓을 파괴하는 거였어.

en: I can't get these fucking numbers out of my head.
Focus, Mason. We're out of fucking time. The world is on the fucking brink of war.
Who's war? Who the fuck are you anyway?
Just keep hearing the fucking numbers.
It's a broadcast, Mason. The numbers are a broadcast. You've been brainwashed.
It's a broadcast, Mason. The broadcast. Hudson learned about the numbers there.
ko: 허드슨은 거기서 그 숫자들에 대해 알게 됐어.
